title: Nearly 5 million children are still dying annually before their fifth birthday: Here’s why
content: An estimated 4.9 million children died before their fifth birthday in 2024, including 2.3 million newborns, according to new United Nations estimates released on Tuesday – highlighting a worrying slowdown in global progress on child survival.
sourceTitle: UN News - Global perspective Human stories
sourceDescription: UN News - Global perspective Human stories | SDGs
